data.content: Shipment complete. Merged work/foolery-c355-impl-20260322 to main (commit 65c9f4f90a04). Pushed to origin/main. CI green: lint, tests (2152 passed), coverage check, and build all pass. Changes: agent-history-view.tsx, interaction-picker.tsx, and contract test — conversation log now matches terminal panel styling for font sizes, colors, and contrast.
